beer.beer_description: This one’s a bit of a show-off. Our Exhibitionist Tropical Ale screams ‘look at me!’ with its lively fruit aromas and light, dry finish. This beer’s an enthusiastic nod to the musos, the artists, the fashionistas, the designers, the hipsters and all the out-of-the-boxers who strut their stuff on the Valley’s lively streets. Best paired with a spot of people watching, take a sip of the Exhibitionist and unleash your inner Valley eccentric.

items.badge_description: Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 190 distinct venues!

user.bio: I like beer, all beer. Hoppy is good.  Very hoppy is excellent.  Fruit or sour is bad :-(

items.badge_description: There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 320 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 65!

As the hub of the town's social scene, your local pub has what you're craving. Be sure to stop by for a pint or two! That's a beer at 20 different venues with the categories of Pub, Irish Pub or Gastropub. Visit 5 more for Level 5!

The traditionally accepted payment for helping someone move, pizza & beer are one of the most perfect combinations in life. That's a beer at 10 different venues categorized as a Pizza Place. Try 5 more for Level 3!

items.badge_description: We’re excited to unveil our annual badge in honor of International Women’s Day, shining a light on the amazing contributions of women and non-binary individuals within the craft beer scene and celebrating their creativity, passion, and dedication. Let’s raise our glasses to the pioneers who have forged a path for the next wave of female, femme-identifying, and non-binary brewers. Join the conversation on Instagram!
Your quest to quench your thirst leaves no stone unturned! That's at least 60 distinct venues!

Want to enjoy a day of brews, but need to keep your wits sharp? There are plenty of delicious brews under 5% for you to sip on throughout the day. That's 225 different beers with an ABV of 5% and lower. Try 5 more for Level 46!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 375 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 76!

Hiking, fishing, swimming - there are so many wonderful things to do while you enjoy the great outdoors. Even beer is better when surrounded by the beauty of nature. That's 5 different venues categorized as Great Outdoors. Visit 5 more for Level 2!

items.badge_description: Fresh from the tap is one of the best ways to enjoy a beer. Just try to use a glass and not drink directly from the tap, as tempting as it may be. That's 110 checkins with the serving style of Draft. Try 5 more for Level 23!

items.badge_description: Ahh, the trusty pale ale; crisp, refreshing, and always a good choice in a bind. That's 80 different Pale Ales or American Pale Wheats. Try 5 more for Level 17.

items.checkin_comment: Light, hoppy, a little bit of breadiness on the backend, a little soapy, maybe a little fruity
